core_mechanism: Localized response of a field at its critical point to a point/line/plane perturbation: a local coupling nucleates a bound finite-size 'droplet' whose core size is fixed by the perturbation strength, surrounded by a universal power-law (scale-free) spatial tail set by the diverging correlation length at criticality
brief_reason: The abstract describes a point/line/plane defect coupling locally to the order parameter near a critical point that nucleates a droplet with core size set by the defect strength and a universal slowly-decaying tail outside the core, i.e. a critical-medium bound response with a scale-free profile.
